synopsis: Collects (not listed in reading order) Star Wars (1998) #7-18, Star Wars: Episode I (1999) One-Shots (Anakin Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Queen Amidala, Qui-Gon Jinn), Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace (1999) ½, and Star Wars: Jango Fett – Open Seasons (2002) #1-4
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Emissaries & Assassins
